overall.description: A cinematic journey aboard the NCART elevated train in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling from industrial districts through commercial areas and along the coastline, showcasing the cyberpunk cityscape before revealing the train's interior with cybernetically enhanced passengers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial district with highway interchanges

events.description: train accelerates past the OTC industrial building complex

agents.ego_description: riding an elevated train through the industrial district, viewing highway ramps below

entered.detail: large industrial structure with green upper levels and OTC logo signage
curved concrete highway ramps and overpasses below the train tracks
industrial cranes visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from an elevated train moving through an industrial district. The OTC industrial building dominates the center view while highway ramps curve below. The sky is partly cloudy with natural diffused lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with close building facades

events.description: train passes extremely close to building facade, temporarily filling frame with concrete and glass
transitioning from industrial area to commercial district with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: train moving through dense commercial buildings with close proximity to structures

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying WILD SIDE advertisement with spacecraft imagery
multi-story building with horizontal window slits passing within meters of the train

segments.scene_description: The train moves through a narrow corridor between commercial buildings, passing extremely close to a concrete office tower. A large digital billboard for WILD SIDE is visible on the right as the industrial structures fade into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station platform with glass enclosure

events.description: train arrives at covered station platform with glass walls and NCART signage
train slows to a stop at the station platform

agents.ego_description: train stopped at station platform, observing the platform through glass walls

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored clothing walking along the platform behind the glass wall

entered.detail: covered train platform with NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit signage
transparent glass walls separating the platform from the train tracks
digital advertisements and maps on the platform walls

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at an NCART station, slowing to a stop behind glass platform walls. Digital advertisements and signage are visible on the platform, and a pedestrian walks by outside the train.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal urban waterfront with bridges and offshore structures

events.description: train exits station revealing open coastal views with water and distant bridges
large green and orange industrial tower comes into prominent view on the left

agents.ego_description: train traveling along elevated coastal route with expansive ocean and bridge views

entered.detail: expansive body of water with distant shoreline and mountains
large bridge structure extending across the water with industrial framework
tall cylindrical building with green and orange paneling and vertical windows
distant industrial platforms or towers visible on the horizon over water
rusted cylindrical water tank on metal supports

segments.scene_description: Exiting the station, the scene opens to a panoramic coastal view with the bay on the right and a large suspension bridge in the distance. A distinctive green industrial tower dominates the left side as the train continues along the waterfront route.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART train interior with passengers and digital displays

events.description: camera pans from exterior city view to interior of the train car revealing passengers
interior lighting dims as train passes through a shaded section or tunnel

agents.ego_description: observing fellow passengers inside the train car while continuing to move through the city

notable_agents.action: passenger with white mohawk and cybernetic arm enhancements using a tablet device
passenger wearing cap and mask sitting on bench with arms crossed

entered.detail: green padded bench seating along the sides of the train car
vertical metal poles for standing passengers
illuminated display showing train route information above the doors
large windows showing passing cityscape outside

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal the train's interior, showing passengers with cybernetic enhancements sitting on green benches. A passenger with a distinctive white mohawk uses a tablet while the train continues moving, and the interior lighting shifts as the train passes through shaded areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the industrial outskirts of Night City into the heart of its commercial district before panning inward to reveal the train's passengers. It begins with a view from an elevated train passing the imposing OTC industrial building and curving highway ramps under a diffused, cloudy sky. As the train accelerates, the industrial landscape fades, replaced by a narrow corridor of commercial towers and a vivid digital billboard for WILD SIDE that looms close to the window. The scene then shifts as the train slows to a stop at an NCART station behind glass walls and digital signage, before accelerating again to open onto a panoramic coastal vista featuring a wide bay, a distant suspension bridge, and a prominent green industrial tower. Finally, the camera pans right to transition from the cityscape to the train's interior, where cybernetically enhanced passengers sit on green benches under shifting light.
